title: cordia angustifolia
intro: Cordia angustifolia, also known as the Mexican plum or palo amarillo, is a plant species in the Bignoniaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cordia angustifolia include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as potential antidiabetic and anticancer properties. Cordia angustifolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions.
